## Proposal Overview
A clear and concise description of the new "proof" or feature you want to see.

## Proposed "Chaos" Logic
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented. Which libraries or mathematical concepts will you use to make this unnecessarily complex? (e.g. NumPy, SymPy, API calls, etc.)

## Why this over simple logic?
In the spirit of this repo, explain why this approach is better than a simple `1 == 1` comparison. What does it teach the user about Python?

## Alternatives Considered
Did you consider other overengineered ways? Why did you pick this one?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, code snippets, or mathematical proofs here.
